title: Lanzhou, Gansu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lanzhou, Gansu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lanzhou is a city in Gansu with a population of 4,359,000. A historic Silk Road city on the Yellow River, famous for its hand-pulled beef noodles and gateway to the Gobi Desert.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
